notes: DHT22/AM2302 uses one bidirectional data line with host start pulse, sensor response pulse, then 40 MSB-first bits encoded by pulse width.
The data pin must be switchable between output drive and input sampling with microsecond-scale delay support.

optional_attachment.pull_up: external or board pull-up required by the single-wire bus

protocol_hints.checksum: sum of first four bytes modulo 256 equals byte 4

notes: Reference drivers require microsecond delay and temporary interrupt masking around the timed read window.
